rationale: Section toggle (Availability/Performance) is URL-driven via ?section=, Performance table is populated via agentMetrics(groupBy: PROVIDER) with window chips, and provider rows drill into /nodes/[nodeId]/providers/[name]?window=<24h|7d|30d> matching the Story 8 chip schema.

findings.summary: perfWindow derives directly from ?window= without validating against {W24H,W7D,W30D}; an invalid value would render an unrecognized active chip and pass through to the query. Minor robustness nit.
